user.title: Add or set up Octo Bed
user.description: Choose how to add or set up an Octo bed.

confirm.title: Octo Bed found
confirm.description: Do you want to add the Octo Bed at {address}?

pick_bed.title: Select a bed
pick_bed.description: Select a discovered bed to add, or choose manual entry. If no beds are listed, make sure they are powered on and in range. Each bed needs its own PIN.

manual_address.title: Bluetooth address
manual_address.description: Enter the bed's Bluetooth address (for example AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.description: The 4-digit PIN is required to establish a connection with your Octo bed. You can find this in your bed's manual or app.

pair_choice.title: Pair with another bed?
pair_choice.description: You can pair this bed with another to create a combined device that controls both beds together. Each bed remains its own device; the paired device adds shared controls.

calibrate_choice.title: Calibrate both beds?
calibrate_choice.description: One calibration session on the combined "Both beds" device moves both beds together: first fully down to 0%, then up while measuring. The measured travel times are stored for both beds, so they stay in sync. You can change this later in the options of the combined device.

data.calibrate_both: Enable calibration of both beds on the combined device

pair_existing.title: Pair two beds
pair_existing.description: Select the two beds to combine into one "Both beds" device. Each bed stays as its own device; the paired device adds shared controls.

data.calibrate_both: Enable calibration of both beds on the combined device

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth address. Use format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF (12 hex characters).
error.pin_rejected: The bed rejected this PIN. Check the PIN and try again.
error.device_unavailable: Device not reachable. Ensure the bed is on and in range (or Bluetooth proxy is connected).

abort.need_two_beds: At least two beds are required to pair. Add another bed first.
abort.entry_not_found: One of the selected beds is no longer available.
abort.pair_created: Paired device "Both beds" has been created.
abort.already_paired: These two beds are already paired.
abort.not_supported: This flow can only be started by the integration itself.

init.title: Configuration
init.description: Set full travel time (seconds) for head and feet (updated by calibration or default 30 s). Optionally show or hide the calibration buttons on the device.
